draw_pile.title: Intruder
draw_pile.effect: A third party enters the situation with an agenda different from both sides.

draw_pile.title: Second Wind
draw_pile.effect: The player may ignore one immediate fatigue, shock, or hesitation consequence.

draw_pile.title: Psychic Echo
draw_pile.effect: A psychic action leaves a trace that another gifted being may detect.

draw_pile.title: Steady Hands
draw_pile.effect: Reduce one situational penalty on a careful physical action.

draw_pile.title: Counter-Surveillance
draw_pile.effect: The player detects that the team is being watched or followed.

draw_pile.title: Clear Signal
draw_pile.effect: A jammed message, psychic impression, or damaged recording yields one usable fragment.

draw_pile.title: Compromised Contact
draw_pile.effect: A trusted source has been frightened, turned, watched, or replaced.

draw_pile.title: Static on the Line
draw_pile.effect: Communication becomes unreliable and a crucial message arrives incomplete.

draw_pile.title: Prepared Equipment
draw_pile.effect: A reasonable item from the character's field kit is available.

draw_pile.title: The Evidence Moves
draw_pile.effect: A person, object, or body central to the investigation is relocated or disappears.

draw_pile.title: Catastrophe
draw_pile.effect: A major plan fails or a hidden threat acts decisively; preserve one fair path forward.

draw_pile.title: Moment of Clarity
draw_pile.effect: The player may ask Agent Fox to restate the most important known clue plainly.

draw_pile.title: Lucky Break
draw_pile.effect: A failed or stalled approach creates a different useful opportunity.

draw_pile.title: Psychic Shelter
draw_pile.effect: One hostile psychic intrusion is weakened or briefly delayed.

draw_pile.title: Last Match
draw_pile.effect: A small source of light, heat, or power remains when it is most needed.

draw_pile.title: Human Anchor
draw_pile.effect: A personal memory or trusted voice helps resist psychic isolation.

draw_pile.title: Useful Rumor
draw_pile.effect: A local rumor points toward a real place, person, or historical event.

draw_pile.title: Quiet Footing
draw_pile.effect: The next stealthy approach avoids one minor obstacle or noise.

draw_pile.title: Opening
draw_pile.effect: An unexpected but credible chance appears; it will vanish if ignored.

draw_pile.title: Old Contact
draw_pile.effect: A believable contact can provide limited information or a small favor.

draw_pile.title: Personal Cost
draw_pile.effect: The next safe choice threatens a relationship, promise, or piece of the character's ordinary life.

draw_pile.title: Calm Under Fire
draw_pile.effect: The player keeps control during one sudden threat or frightening revelation.

draw_pile.title: Hidden Exit
draw_pile.effect: A plausible escape route or overlooked access point becomes available.

draw_pile.title: Authority Arrives
draw_pile.effect: Police, security, military, or hostile officials complicate the scene.

draw_pile.title: Unwritten Turn
draw_pile.effect: Agent Fox introduces one surprising development consistent with established canon and clues.

draw_pile.title: Field Medicine
draw_pile.effect: Stabilize a wounded person long enough to move or speak.

draw_pile.title: Watcher in the Crowd
draw_pile.effect: Someone nearby is observing the player with professional patience.

draw_pile.title: Borrowed Time
draw_pile.effect: An approaching threat is delayed long enough for one meaningful action.

draw_pile.title: Witness Remembers
draw_pile.effect: A witness recalls one concrete sensory detail after careful questioning.

draw_pile.title: Cold Read
draw_pile.effect: The player notices one revealing emotional or behavioral detail.

draw_pile.title: Wrong Door, Right Secret
draw_pile.effect: A mistaken route exposes dangerous information that was not meant to be found yet.

draw_pile.title: Familiar Pattern
draw_pile.effect: A repeated symbol, tactic, or psychic signature is recognized.

draw_pile.title: Unbroken Thread
draw_pile.effect: One apparently unrelated clue can be connected to the current investigation.

draw_pile.title: Protective Instinct
draw_pile.effect: The player can shield an ally from one immediate narrative consequence.

draw_pile.title: Agency Pull
draw_pile.effect: Official credentials open a limited door, file, or conversation.

draw_pile.title: Dead Drop
draw_pile.effect: A concealed note, cache, or prearranged signal survives compromise.
